_comment: Example autobuild task queue. Each task is atomic + independently verifiable. The orchestrator runs them in order (or by depends_on), TDD, one commit each. Copy to ./autobuild.tasks.json and edit. verify = a shell command (cwd = project root) that exits 0 when the task is done. needs_review = true HALTS for a human before committing (use for security-sensitive tasks).

tasks.title: Add an add(a,b) helper, TDD
tasks.spec: Create src/math.js exporting add(a,b)=>a+b. Write test/test-math.test.js first (node:test), run it red, implement, run green.

tasks.title: Add a mul(a,b) helper, TDD
tasks.spec: Extend src/math.js with mul(a,b)=>a*b. TDD as above.
